    lcp = []
    for i in 0..n-2
        a = words[i]
        b = words[i+1]
        len = 0
        while len < a.length && len < b.length && a[len] == b[len]
            len +=1

        lcp << len

    # Compute prefix_max array
    prefix_max = Array.new(n-1, 0)

    end

def solve(words)
    n = words.length
    if n == 0
        return []
    end
    m = n - 1
    lcp_pairs = Array.new(m) { 0 }
    (0...m).each do |j|
        lcp_pairs[j] = lcp(words[j], words[j+1])
    end
    # compute prefix_max
    prefix_max = Array.new(m) { 0 }
    prefix_max[0] = lcp_pairs[0]
    (1...m).each do |j|
        prefix_max[j] = [prefix_max[j-1], lcp_pairs[j]].max
    end
    # compute suffix_max
    suffix_max = Array.new(m) { 0 }
    suffix_max[m-1] = lcp_pairs[m-1]
    (m-2).downto(0) do |j|
        suffix_max[j] = [suffix_max[j+1], lcp_pairs[j]].max
    end
    answer = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    (0...n).each do |i|
        if n == 1
            answer[i] = 0
        else
            if (n-1) < 2
                answer[i] = 0
            else
                # compute max_val
                if i == 0
                    # excluded positions are 0 and -1 (invalid)
                    # so take lcp_pairs[1...m-1]
                    if m >= 2
                        start = 1
                        end_idx = m-1
                        if start <= end_idx
                            max_val = suffix_max[start]
                        else
                            max_val = 0
                        end
                    else
                        max_val = 0
                    end
                elsif i == n-1
                    # excluded positions are n-2 and n-1
                    # take lcp_pairs[0...m-2]
                    if m >= 2
                        start = 0
                        end_idx = m-2
                        if start <= end_idx
                            max_val = prefix_max[end_idx]
                        else
                            max_val = 0
                        end
                    else
                        max_val = 0
                    end
                else
                    # i is between 1 and n-2
                    left = 0
                    if i-2 >= 0
                        left = prefix_max[i-2]
                    end
                    right = 0
                    if i+1 < m
                        right = suffix_max[i+1]
                    end
                    max_val = [left, right].max
                end
                # compute new_pair_lcp
                if i == 0 || i == n-1
                    new_pair_lcp = 0
                else
                    a = words[i-1]
                    b = words[i+1]
                    new_pair_lcp = lcp(a, b)
                end
                answer[i] = [max_val, new_pair_lcp].max
            end
        end
    end
    answer
end

def lcp(a, b)
    min_len = [a.length, b.length].min
    i = 0
    while i < min_len && a[i] == b[i]
        i += 1
    end
    i
end
